visual_description: A close-up, high-angle shot shows a person's hands tending to a fire in a small, dark space. The hands, belonging to a person in a dark t-shirt, are arranging glowing red embers inside a metal charcoal stove. The scene is dimly lit, with the warm, flickering light of the fire being the primary source of illumination. In the background, a cardboard box and a pair of slippers rest on the tiled floor. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top right corner. The camera follows a person with long, dark, curly hair from behind as they walk through a dimly lit, narrow space, possibly a restaurant or shop at night. The person is wearing a dark jacket. The background is out of focus, showing the blurred lights and shapes of the interior. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera continues to follow the person from behind as they walk past a counter. The background becomes slightly more in focus, revealing the interior of the establishment. A man speaks in a clear, slightly hurried voice, announcing, "老板，炭炉可以用了" (Boss, the charcoal stove is ready to use). His tone is direct and matter-of-fact
